title: taraxacum pyrranthes
intro: Taraxacum pyrranthes, also known as Dandelion, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum pyrranthes are attributed to its roots, leaves, and flowers, which contain vitamins A, C, and K, as well as minerals like potassium and iron. The health benefits of Taraxacum pyrranthes include its ability to act as a diuretic, reduce inflammation, and support liver function, making it beneficial for treating digestive issues, skin problems, and kidney stones. Taraxacum pyrranthes is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and can also be used in salads, or as a coffee substitute.
